name: Leyard Optoelectronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Leyard Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. designs, produces, distributes, and services digital displays, video walls, and visualization products worldwide. The company offers LED video walls, LCD video walls, large format LCD displays, processors and players, 4K LCD displays, rear projection video walls, touch displays, accessories, and custom displays, as well as LED display products for rental and staging applications. It serves control room, corporate, digital signage, hospitality, oil and gas, retail, broadcast, higher education, healthcare, museums, sports and entertainment, government, rental and staging, and house of worship markets. The company was formerly known as Beijing Leyard Electronics Technology Co Ltd. Leyard Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. has a strategic partnership with Lighthouse Technologies Ltd. for providing a range of sports venue display solutions. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
